calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: National Credit Adjusters,
No appearance by Defendant Jesue Martinez.
Copy of the filed Declaration of Sheryl Goertz in lieu of appearance was presented in open court for review.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal - $4,907.38
Interest - $1,085.40
Costs - $294.50
Total - $6,287.28

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Set For Trial On Dec-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
